title: Map Share
description: Per-map share token contract. One active token per map. Token is 32-byte random base64url stored raw (tradeoff: convenience for owner GETs vs. hash storage). Public read-only view at /share/map/[token]. Signed-in org members are redirected to authenticated /suite/map/[id]. Documents agent owns audit logging; Operations agent owns share UX.

events_emitted.description: Owner generates a new share link. Replaces any prior token (one active per map).
Public visitor opens /share/map/[token]. Logged (anonymized — IP hash only).
Owner revokes the active token. All subsequent visits return 404.
